prose:
The Fukui reactivity analysis on furan was performed using Density Functional Theory (DFT) with the B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis set (tier `standard`). The calculation was carried out in the gas phase with a charge of 0 and a multiplicity of 1. The geometry was sourced from the provided `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/furan.xyz` file and was not optimized at this level of theory. PySCF was used as the backend software.

The most electrophilic site (highest fukui_plus index) was found to be the carbon atom at position 5 (0-based index 4), with a fukui_plus value of 1.92429.
The most nucleophilic site (highest fukui_minus index) was also found to be the carbon atom at position 5 (0-based index 4), with a fukui_minus value of 0.16164.
The calculation converged successfully.
